text:
Kenzaki (ケンザキ, Kenzaki) was a professional Hunter and a member of Teradein Neutral's Pure Paladin Squad. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 329 

Background

Very little is known of Kenzaki. During the course of their life, Kenzaki became a Hunter and learned Nen. They then joined Teradein Neutral's Seirin Group and was one of the eight Hunters sent to eliminate Illumi Zoldyck.

Plot

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

]]

Following Teradein's decision to arrest Illumi and Hisoka, Kenzaki is sent to stop the Needle People and follow one of the blimps dispatched by Killua. Upon hearing of the crushing defeat suffered by one, possibly two of the teams who joined the hunt, Bushidora Ambitious remarks that it is not a job for amateurs and suggests that Teradein send out a warning to the Hunters going after the Needle People. However, Kenzaki does not answer the phone, prompting Bushidora to take matters into his own hands. Later, Loupe Highland bursts into Teradein's office and informs him that all the Bushidora's team members and the one previously pursuing the Needle People have been annihilated. Teradein then confirms Kenzaki's death in a video message. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 330 

Abilities & Powers

Kenzaki had all the benefits granted by their status as Hunter.

Nen

As a Pro-Hunter, Kenzaki was capable of using Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 7, Chapter 60
